item_text: user -> admin — type=message; label="login"; explanation="user sends login request to admin system"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: user successfully logs into the admin system module: login source pages: 1 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: user123 - password: pass123 test steps: 1. user enters "user123" as the username. 2. user enters "pass123" as the password. 3. user clicks on the login button. 4. system verifies the credentials. 5. system displays a success message. expected result: user is logged into the admin system.

item_text: admin -> user — type=message; label="login"; explanation="admin sends login response to user"

item_text: user -> cart — type=message; label="add"; explanation="user sends add request to cart"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-additemtocart-001 title: user successfully adds an item to their cart module: add item to cart source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - item name: "mouse" - item price: 29.99 test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user clicks on the "add item" button. 3. user selects "mouse" as the item name. 4. user enters "29.99" as the item price. 5. user clicks on the "add" button. 6. system adds the item to the cart. 7. system displays a success message. expected result: item is added to the user's cart.

item_text: user -> cart — type=message; label="remove"; explanation="user sends remove request to cart"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-edgecase-005 title: user attempts to remove an item with a very long name module: remove item from cart source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in and has an item in their cart. test data: - item name: "d" * 256 test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user clicks on the "remove item" button. 3. user selects "d" * 256 as the item name. 4. user clicks on the "remove" button. 5. system checks if the item exists in the cart. 6. system displays an error message. expected result: item is not removed from the user's cart and an error
